title: WOS Workflow
description: Single author-time schema for a WOS workflow. Scales from Forms+ intake (~30 lines) to complex case management (~3000 lines) without changing shape. Required core: impactLevel, actors, lifecycle. Optional embedded blocks (governance, agents, aiOversight, signature, custody, advanced, assurance) appear only when product behavior demands them. Conditional rules require governance for rightsImpacting/safetyImpacting workflows, agents block for agent-typed actors, and signature block for signature-gated transitions. Deployment-environment configuration (calendars, notification templates, ontology alignment) lives in two sidecars referenced by targetWorkflow URI. See ADR 0076.

$wosWorkflow.description: Sole top-level version marker. Stream identity (governance, agents, signature, custody, advanced) is implicit in the workflow envelope version. Compliance claims compose as $wosWorkflow@X.Y. Replaces $wosKernel / $wosWorkflowGovernance / $wosAIIntegration / $wosAdvanced.

url.description: Stable workflow identity. Sidecars join by this url.

impactLevel.description: Drives conditional block requirements. rightsImpacting and safetyImpacting MUST embed governance.

allOf.title: Rights-impacting and safety-impacting workflows MUST embed governance.
Workflows whose actors include any agent-typed actor MUST declare agents[].

allOf.$comment: Cross-reference rule beyond JSON Schema expressivity: every actor with type=='agent' MUST have a matching agents[].id. Enforced by lint rule WOS-AGENT-XREF-001.

Cross-cutting rule beyond JSON Schema expressivity: any transition gated by signature (on.kind=='signature') requires a signature block, and signers[] MUST cover the gating actor. Enforced by lint rule WOS-SIG-COVER-001.

allOf.title: Workflows with both agents and advanced features SHOULD declare aiOversight.

CaseFile.description: Structured case data. Either declared inline via fields, or referenced via contractRef. Formspec is the recommended contract binding (kernel contractHook seam).

IntakeReference.description: Public-intake form. References a Formspec definition. Validated intake is converted to caseFile via IntakeHandoff (ADR 0073).

type.$comment: Kernel: 'human' | 'system'. AI Integration adds 'agent' via actorExtension seam (ADR 0077). Open via x- prefix.

collection.$comment: Foreach only. FEL expression yielding a bounded array. ADR 0078.

Contracts.$comment: Validation/guard contracts and capability contracts. Pairs with bindings[] per ADR 0080 governed output-commit pipeline.

OutputBinding.description: Governed output-commit pipeline projection. Per ADR 0080: source surface + contractRef + projection map + writeScope + mutationSource + verificationLevel. Validated mutations + Facts-tier provenance emit deterministically.

on.$comment: Source surface: state id, transition id, capability id, signal name.

tier.description: Minimum provenance tier emitted. Facts is kernel default. Higher tiers attach via provenanceLayer seam (ADR 0077).

Governance.description: Embedded due-process, review, and pipeline governance. Required for rightsImpacting and safetyImpacting impactLevel. Was wos-workflow-governance.schema.json plus wos-policy-parameters.schema.json plus wos-due-process.schema.json plus wos-assertion-gate.schema.json.

dueProcess.$comment: Notice, opportunity to be heard, appeal mechanism, adverse-decision policy.

policyParameters.$comment: Temporal parameters, deadline config, business calendar refs.

AgentDeclaration.description: Was wos-ai-integration.schema.json AgentDeclaration plus wos-agent-config.schema.json plus wos-drift-monitor.schema.json. Inlined per ADR 0076.

id.$comment: MUST match an actor.id where actor.type=='agent'.

autonomy.$comment: Capped by impactLevel. rightsImpacting MUST NOT exceed assistive without explicit governance permission.

fallbackChain.$comment: Actor ids, in order. MUST terminate in a human-review actor for rightsImpacting transitions.

capabilities.$comment: Capability sub-shape: declared write scope, contract refs, tool grants.

AIOversight.description: Cross-cutting AI policy. Disclosure, drift detection, narrative provenance, volume constraints. EU AI Act Art. 13 / OMB M-24-10 alignment.

Signature.description: Embedded signature workflow semantics. LOAD-BEARING for any DocuSign-tier workflow: signing order IS the workflow. Routes through Signature Profile semantics; SignatureAffirmation provenance anchors to Trellis via custodyHook (ADR 0077).

order.$comment: conditional uses transition guards to route between signers.

voidConditions.$comment: FEL guards that void the workflow before completion (e.g. expiry).

auditCertificate.$comment: Output binding for the signed-document audit certificate.

Custody.description: Embedded Trellis custody declaration. Load-bearing whenever a workflow claims anchoring on transitions or signature events. Was wos-custody-hook-encoding.schema.json (sidecar); promoted to embedded per ADR 0076 D-2 / Q4.

on.$comment: Transition id, signature event id, or determination tag.

Advanced.description: Optional. DCR constraint zones, equity guardrails, SMT verifiable constraints, multi-step session config, circuit breakers. Was wos-advanced.schema.json plus wos-equity.schema.json plus wos-verification-report.schema.json (author-time half).

equity.$comment: Bias caps, disparity thresholds, equity FEL expressions.

verifiableConstraints.$comment: SMT constraint declarations. Verification report is a runtime artifact in wos-provenance-log.

Assurance.description: Optional. Assurance level declaration, attestation, subject continuity. Was wos-assurance.schema.json.
